mapper.select: select id, type, duration, heart_rate, calories, date, user_id from fitness where user_id = #{userId} order by date desc
select id, type, duration, heart_rate, calories, date, user_id from fitness where id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into fitness(type, duration, heart_rate, calories, date, user_id) values(#{type}, #{duration}, #{heart_rate}, #{calories}, #{date}, #{user_id})
mapper.update: update fitness set type = #{type}, duration = #{duration}, heart_rate = #{heart_rate}, calories = #{calories}, date = #{date} where id = #{id}
